name: Kasett Rewind
description: Rolling compaction window + structured thread tracking. Your agent never forgets what it was doing.
author: Molt AI Corp

enabled.description: Master switch — when false, plugin is completely inert

windowSize.description: Number of compaction summaries to retain in the rolling window

windowBudgetSplit.description: Token budget proportions [oldest..newest summary, recent turns]. Must sum to 1.0, length = windowSize + 1

threadTracking.description: Enable structured thread snapshots in compaction output
